description:
Handle secondary MDI events as dashboard cues or ops signals without storing sensitive content.

**Scope**
- Based on T-052 triage, implement handlers for message/file/voucher/exam event families needed for launch.
- Store only unread/status/count/cue metadata where appropriate; message bodies, files, labs, photos, and clinical content stay in MDI.
- Explicitly no-op safe-to-ignore v1 events so they do not pollute DLQs.

**Acceptance**
- Each event type in the launch catalog has a handler, no-op, or ops route.
- A message fixture can set a dashboard cue without storing the message body.
- File/lab events never persist document content in Apoth.
title: MDI dashboard cue handlers: messages, files, vouchers, exams
